options.choose_when: The charter already exists and the missing spec should be created inside it.

required_fields.description: First repo-relative governed directory ending in /
required_fields.name: scope_dir_1

required_fields.description: Required only when creating a new group
required_fields.name: group_title

required_fields.description: Integer order for a newly created group
required_fields.name: group_order

required_fields.description: Integer order for the spec inside its group
required_fields.name: order

required_fields.description: Short planning note for the charter entry
required_fields.name: charter_notes

options.why: Create the tracking file first, then expand the design doc.
